measurement_note: Size is r, the Orders row count. The legal 64/256/1024 single-product tiers span 16x and give every order a distinct date, so all rows influence the latest-date decision while exactly one row is returned. The remotely Accepted DENSE_RANK query is O(r log r), and an independent grouped-maximum join also passes. A correct correlated MAX query completes every tier and is rejected only by scaling.
